title: Add Google site verification HTML file to public directory

requirements.text: Add a static file named 'google38eb840a952aed49.html' to the frontend public directory (frontend/public/google38eb840a952aed49.html) so that Google Search Console can verify site ownership by accessing it at the root URL path.
acceptanceCriteria: The file contains the standard Google site verification content format: 'google-site-verification: google38eb840a952aed49'
The file is served at the root path /google38eb840a952aed49.html when the site is deployed
Google Search Console can successfully fetch the file to complete ownership verification

constraints: Do not modify frontend/index.html or any immutable frontend paths
The verification file must be placed in frontend/public so it is served as a static asset at the root URL
nonGoals: Changing or duplicating the existing Google Search Console meta tag already present in frontend/index.html
Any other SEO or sitemap modifications
